mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.username, e.password, e.name, e.gender, e.phone, e.dept_id, e.entry_date, e.create_time, e.update_time, d.name AS deptName FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')// 员工姓名,字符串拼接
AND e.gender = #{gender}// 员工性别
AND e.dept_id = #{deptId}// 员工部门
AND DATE(e.entry_date) >= #{begin}// 员工入职日期
AND DATE(e.entry_date) <= #{end}// 员工入职日期
ORDER BY e.update_time DESC
